_comment: Generic TREE template — base parameters for a tree-form plant, to be copied into specific tree species (kapok, brazil nut, etc.) and tweaked. Rendered with the procedural 'tree' model (brown trunk + green canopy). That model bakes its own colours, so colorYoung/colorOld act as an overall brightness TINT — keep them near-white. maxRadius drives full size (scaled by food); seedShare sets how many seed at world-gen.
name: Tree
